steps.label: Login and Access Compliance Dashboard
steps.description: On this screen, you will be prompted to log in to the system using your credentials. After successful authentication, you will be directed to the Compliance Dashboard section. Please enter your username and password to proceed. This is the secure entry point for supervisors to access compliance data and management tools.
data_validation: Username and Password must not be empty.
Username must be a valid system account.
Password must meet minimum security requirements (e.g., length, complexity).

buttons.label: Login
buttons.description: Authenticate and access the Compliance Dashboard.

steps.label: Select Compliance Filter Criteria
steps.description: This screen allows you to filter compliance data by organizational unit, individual worker, and date range. Use the dropdown to select an organizational unit, the search box to find a specific worker, and the calendar picker to specify a date range. Once your criteria are set, click 'Apply Filters' to view relevant compliance metrics. Instructions and guidance are provided to help you refine your search for targeted compliance insights.

fields.label: Organizational Unit
fields.error_message: Please select a valid organizational unit.

fields.label: Date Range
fields.error_message: Please select a valid date range.

data_validation: If both Organizational Unit and Individual Worker are selected, ensure the worker belongs to the selected unit.
Date Range start date must not be after end date.
Date Range must not be in the future.
At least one filter criterion must be selected.

buttons.label: Apply Filters
buttons.description: Apply selected filter criteria to retrieve compliance metrics.
actions: Navigate to Display Filtered Compliance Metrics

steps.label: Apply Dashboard Filters
steps.description: When the Supervisor clicks the 'Apply Filters' button, the system must query the backend for completed training, outstanding certifications, and recent incident reports for the selected Organizational Unit and/or Individual Worker within the specified Date Range. The system must aggregate and format the retrieved data for dashboard display.

rules.label: Backend Query Trigger
rules.logic: On 'Apply Filters' button click, initiate a backend query using the selected values for Organizational Unit, Individual Worker, and Date Range as filter criteria.

rules.label: Data Retrieval
rules.logic: Retrieve records for completed training, outstanding certifications, and recent incident reports matching the filter criteria from the backend data sources.

rules.label: Data Aggregation
rules.logic: Aggregate the retrieved data to calculate counts and generate lists for each metric (Completed Training, Outstanding Certifications, Recent Incident Reports).

rules.label: Data Formatting
rules.logic: Format the aggregated data for display on the dashboard, ensuring each metric is presented as a count and/or list as required.

steps.label: Filtered Compliance Metrics Dashboard
steps.description: After applying your filter criteria, this dashboard displays key compliance metrics for the selected organizational unit and/or worker. You will see counts and lists for completed training, outstanding certifications, and recent incident reports. Each metric includes a 'View Details' button to explore more granular information. Use this dashboard to quickly assess compliance status and identify areas needing attention.

fields.label: Completed Training
fields.error_message: Unable to retrieve completed training data.

fields.label: Outstanding Certifications
fields.error_message: Unable to retrieve outstanding certifications data.

fields.label: Recent Incident Reports
fields.error_message: Unable to retrieve recent incident reports data.

data_validation: Metrics must reflect the applied filter criteria.
Counts must be accurate and up-to-date.
Incident reports must be within the selected date range.

buttons.label: View Details (Completed Training)
buttons.description: View detailed list of completed training records.

buttons.label: View Details (Outstanding Certifications)
buttons.description: View detailed list of outstanding certifications.

buttons.label: View Details (Recent Incident Reports)
buttons.description: View detailed list of recent incident reports.

steps.label: Metric Details and Prior History Search
steps.description: This screen presents a detailed list for the selected compliance metric, such as workers with outstanding certifications or incident report details. You can review individual records and use the 'Search Prior History' button to access historical compliance data for a selected worker. Guidance is provided to help you interpret the details and understand the context of each record.
data_validation: Metric details must correspond to the selected metric.
No duplicate records in the detail list.
Historical data must be accurate and relevant to the selected worker.
If searching prior history, ensure a worker is selected.

buttons.label: Search Prior History
buttons.description: Retrieve and display historical compliance records for the selected worker.

steps.label: Search Prior History
steps.description: When the Supervisor clicks the 'Search Prior History' button in the metric detail view, the system must query the backend for all historical training, certification, and incident report data for the selected worker. The results must be displayed in a modal or expanded section within the UI.

rules.label: Historical Data Query Trigger
rules.logic: On 'Search Prior History' button click, use the selected worker from the Metric Detail Record to query the backend for all historical training, certification, and incident report records.

rules.label: Result Display
rules.logic: Display the retrieved historical records in a modal window or an expanded section within the current view, ensuring the data is clearly associated with the selected worker.
